title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 59.340 - Records to be recorded in separate books by classes
text:
59.340.  Records to be recorded in separate books by classes. — The several classes of instruments of writing mentioned in the several subdivisions of section 59.330 shall be recorded in separate books, according to their classification therein.
(RSMo 1939 § 13162) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 11544; 1919 § 10569; 1909 § 10382
